title: O-line composite (per-team offensive line context)
description: Produced by scripts/build_oline.py from the keyless ESPN roster endpoint, optionally refined with nflverse 2025 OL snap shares (source says which). Composite = z-score blend 0.4*weight + 0.4*experience + 0.2*continuity, mean 0 across the league. CONTEXT for the registered weight-0 ol_composite_vs_dl signal: params.applied is false and weight is 0.0 until the walk-forward optimizer says otherwise; game probabilities are unchanged by this file.

source.description: Honest provenance: 'espn_roster + nflverse_snap_counts_2025' when continuity uses real snap shares, or an 'espn_roster only ...' string naming the experience proxy.

teams.description: Keyed by canonical nflverse abbreviation; all 32 teams (minProperties 30 tolerates a transient roster outage, the contract test pins 32).

continuity.description: Share in [0,1]: returning-OL 2025 snap share when refined, else share of linemen with >= 2 seasons.

composite.description: Z-score blend, league mean 0; positive = better than average line.

avg_bench_press.description: Avg combine bench-press reps of rostered OL (nflverse aggregate; null when the aggregate is absent or the team had no tested linemen).

bench_n.description: Linemen with a combine bench row (join quality).
